zh.lifeSummary: 當Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.於1645年出生在英國戴文德利時，他的父親John Radford51歲，母親Elizabeth Farrington40歲。他於1665年2月12日與Lettice Fenn在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.于1645年出生在英国戴文德利时，他的父亲John Radford51岁，母亲Elizabeth Farrington40岁。他于1665年2月12日与Lettice Fenn在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Radford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Redifer
meanings: Possibly English: variant of Reddiford, itself a variant of Radford .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. was born in 1645, in Chudleigh, Devon, England, his father, John Radford, was 51 and his mother, Elizabeth Farrington, was 40. He married Lettice Fenn on 12 February 1665, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1687, in Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. est né en 1645, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Radford, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Farrington, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lettice Fenn le 12 février 1665, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1687, à Old Rappahannock, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Old Rappahannock, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. 1645 in Chudleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Radford 51 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Farrington 40. Er hat am 12. Februar 1665 in Devon, England Lettice Fenn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1687 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.(이)가 1645년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Radford(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Farrington(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1665년 2월 12일 영국 데폰에서 Lettice Fenn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 드 랩아해노c크에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 드 랩아해노c크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. nasceu em 1645, em Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Radford, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Farrington, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lettice Fenn em 12 de fevereiro de 1665, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1687, em Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. родился в 1645 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Radford было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Farrington, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lettice Fenn 12 февраля 1665 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1687 г. в местности олд раппаханнокк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности олд раппаханнокк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. nació en 1645, en Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Radford, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Farrington, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lettice Fenn el 12 de febrero de 1665, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1687, en Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America.
